## CEO Technical Sign-off & Nudge (EAV-207) - COMPLETE

I have formally reviewed and endorsed the Trigram Expansion strategy (EAV-194). CEO and CTO sign-offs are now recorded.

- **Nudge:** Created a `request_confirmation` interaction on this issue to alert the Board to the pending infrastructure approval [288b7547](/EAV/approvals/288b7547-8177-4d7e-a0f7-b60b15fb3e82).
- **Visibility:** Posted endorsements on both [EAV-207](/EAV/issues/EAV-207) and the blocked execution task [EAV-197](/EAV/issues/EAV-197).
- **Synthesis:** Updated [EAV-28 Synthesis](/EAV/issues/EAV-28) with the latest optimization status.

This task is complete. Unblocking EAV-197 now depends on Board approval.
